nodes.speaker: AI
lines: Good - you're keeping yourself alive. That was the hard part.
Next you'll want a shelter. A foothold before the journey ahead.

responses.buttonText: How do I build a shelter?

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: You'll need wood first - chop trees with your axe, then place a Cabin from the build menu. Tips are on your HUD.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: Shelter's up. You can stand on your own now.
Time to look outward. Explore Humble Abode and find the main village - there may be answers there.
